# Data Engineer

## Overview
We are hiring a Data Engineer to build reliable data pipelines and analytics foundations. You will work on batch and streaming ingestion, data modeling, and orchestration.

## Responsibilities
- Design and implement ETL/ELT pipelines
- Build data models for analytics and reporting
- Maintain data quality checks and monitoring
- Collaborate with data scientists and backend teams

## Requirements (Must-have)
- Python (3+ years)
- SQL (advanced)
- Data pipelines (Airflow or similar)
- Data warehousing (BigQuery, Snowflake, or Redshift)
- Data modeling

## Nice-to-have
- Spark or PySpark
- Kafka
- dbt
- Docker
- CI/CD for data workflows

## Seniority
Mid

## Domain
data
